value.found_quote: MCP servers and hosted MCP tools | Attaching MCP-backed capabilities | [Integrations and observability](https://developers.openai.com/api/docs/guides/agents/integrations-observability#mcp)
value.rationale: The page explicitly lists "MCP servers and hosted MCP tools" as an agent property used for "Attaching MCP-backed capabilities," matching the claim exactly. It appears in the agent configuration table as an active, documented feature with a dedicated link to further documentation. The page also reinforces this in the "When to split one agent into several" section, noting that "A specialist needs a different tool or MCP surface" as a common reason to split agents. There is no indication this is in preview, deprecated, or sunset.
